title: Vegetarian Vada Pav
description: A popular Indian street food, this vegetarian vada pav recipe features crispy fried vadas served in a soft, fluffy pav bun.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine pav dough ingredients and knead for 10 minutes.
2. Let the dough rise for 1 hour.
3. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal portions and shape into buns.
4. Heat oil in a deep frying pan for frying the vadas.
5. Once the oil is hot, add the vadas and fry until golden brown.
6. Assemble the vada pav by placing a fried vada inside a soft pav bun.
7. Serve hot with chutney or ketchup.
8. For the potato filling, boil the potatoes until tender, then mash and season with salt.
